text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Good morning! Did you have a good break?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I hung out a bunch with Sei!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
We played with a kitty at the park, and took
naps, and skipped stones at the pond, and took
more naps...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
It was suuuper nice! Now I feel amazing! Urara, la
la la! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After hanging out with Seiun Sky, it seems Haru
Urara feels very relaxed.
